sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁעלבּין שׁעלבים

Transliteration: sha‛albı̂ym sha‛ălabbı̂yn

Phonetic: shah-al-beem'

BDB Definition:

Shaalbim or Shaalabbin = "place of foxes"
  1. a town in Dan occupied by the Amorites

Origin: pl. from H7776

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
